summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new Star Trek TNG LCARS features: tricorder splash screen with scanning animation and rotating German quotes on splash, login, and dashboard screens.

ui_bugs.issue: SessionStorage 'lcars_splash_shown' not consistently persisting - splash reappears on some page reloads
ui_bugs.details: Initial session shows sessionStorage as 'None' after splash completion, but subsequent tests show 'true'. Needs investigation.

passed_tests: Splash screen appears on first visit with tricorder scanning animation
Tricorder canvas animation renders correctly with rotating sweep and particles
German Star Trek quotes appear on splash screen after scan completion
Splash screen transitions correctly to login page after animation
Login page displays German Star Trek quotes with proper formatting
Login page quote rotation works (12-second interval)
Captain P login successful (username: captain, password: engage)
Nummer Eins login successful (username: nummer1, password: makeitso)
Dashboard displays German Star Trek quotes with author attribution
Dashboard statistics load correctly for both user roles
Navigation between dashboard sections works correctly
Role-based access controls maintained from previous iteration
LCARS UI theming and German text properly displayed
action_item_for_main_agent: Investigate sessionStorage persistence issue in SplashScreen.js handleSplashComplete function - sessionStorage.setItem may not be executing properly in some cases

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (13/14 new features working, 1 minor sessionStorage bug)
